title: Parliament Budget Session LIVE: Both Houses hold moment of silence for the martyrdom of Bhagat Singh, Rajguru and Sukhdev in 1931
description: Nirmala Sitharaman to introduce Corporate Laws (Amendment) Bill in Lok Sabha; Union Minister of State (MoS) for Corporate Affairs Harsh Malhotra will make a statement on action taken by the Government on the previous recommendations of the Committee on Demands for Grants (2024-25)
